title: Full Task View
excerpt: Is there a way to get the full task view like what you get when using the search to be the way tasks open in the board itself? It would be nice to have all that information available when opening the task instead of only…

posts.author: DCGyptech (Dimitri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to get the full task view like what you get when using the search to be the way tasks open in the board itself? It would be nice to have all that information available when opening the task instead of only seeing updates and having to scroll across to update individual fields.

Board View

Board View1618×764 85.5 KB

Search View

Search View1818×960 113 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Dimitri,

Good question! At this time, it isn’t possible to format the item in the task view as it is using the search tool. I hear where you’re coming from here and will certainly relay this to our dedicated team internally, incase there are any plans to update the item view in the near future

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DCGyptech

Have you considered using different item views? If you open the item, you can edit to add different view types similar to on a board level. There’s one called ‘Item Card’ that will let you customise which fields are displayed when you open the item and can tailor the information you’re met with.

Give it a try and let me know if you get stuck! I can always show you

Peta | Upstream Tech

posts.author: DCGyptech (Dimitri)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see any way to adjust the Item View anywhere when I open the task.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
You need to go to the top left and select Edit and layout.

Then you’ll be able to get to the settings of the Item Card and decide which columns you want to see.
